name: frontend-design-discipline
description: Focused frontend review skills for composition, brand, copy, UI stability, and iterative refinement.

interface.shortDescription: Focused reviewer skills for frontend and UI quality
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles focused reviewer skills for frontend composition, brand signal, copy quality, UI stability, and iterative review-refine loops. When this plugin is explicitly invoked, at least one critic or review-refine pass is expected before the work is considered done, and the first independent review should prefer a dedicated subagent when delegation is available.
defaultPrompt: Use Frontend Design Discipline as a reviewer, not just a builder. Run at least one critic pass before concluding, and prefer the first pass to be an independent subagent review when delegation is available.
If the user explicitly asks for subagent review or independent critique, attempt delegation first and keep reviewer outputs free of tool-availability or process chatter.
Review this UI for composition, hierarchy, and visual balance, then list only the remaining issues.
Run a review-refine loop on this Figma frame until it passes the stated bar.
